name: wxcode-admin-onyx-crypto
title: Onyx Admin
description: Deep-obsidian admin aesthetic: near-black canvas (#0a0a0f), elevated dark panels (#14141c / #1c1c28), emerald primary accent (#10b981) with neon glow hover, violet secondary accent (#8b5cf6), Inter type with tabular-nums, neon-tinted delta chips, 10px radii, hairline borders. Archetype = wide labeled left rail (220px) + sticky topbar (context-switcher pill + entity address pill + search + icon actions) + 4 KPI sparkline cards + main grid (area chart with timeframe tabs / ranked-rows side panel) + full-width records table with delta-colored column. Matching list, form, and detail screens included.

query.en: Apply this deep-obsidian neon admin aesthetic to my domain — wide labeled left rail, sticky topbar with context-switcher and entity address pills, 4 KPI sparkline cards with neon glow, area chart with timeframe tabs, ranked-rows side panel, and a dense records table with delta-colored columns. Include matching list, form, and detail screens.
query.zh-CN: 将这个深黑曜石霓虹风格管理后台应用到我的领域：宽标签左侧导航栏、带上下文切换和实体地址的置顶栏、4 个带霓虹光晕的 KPI 卡片、带时间范围选项卡的面积图、排名行侧面板和带颜色差异列的密集记录表格。包含配套的列表、表单和详情页面。

provenance.note: original archetype; no third-party template reproduced
